name: cariak
description: Cariak — Open-Source Deep Research Agent. Multi-source research (internet, social, academic, news, market) with Pocketto-inspired skill pipeline.

skills.name: cariak-grinding
skills.description: Refine pitch into research spec with BDD GWT research questions

skills.name: cariak-advising
skills.description: LLM-to-LLM counsel from 3-5 expert personas before research

skills.name: cariak-planning
skills.description: Decompose spec into sub-agent tasks + route output documents

skills.name: cariak-researching
skills.description: Dispatch 5 parallel sub-agents to research internet/social/academic/news/market

skills.name: cariak-synthesizing
skills.description: Cross-source merge, deduplicate, resolve contradictions, confidence-grade

skills.name: cariak-validating
skills.description: Falsification-based claim validation with Iron Laws

skills.name: cariak-reflecting
skills.description: Auto-reflection quality gate — PASS or RE-RESEARCH loop

skills.name: cariak-remembering
skills.description: Multi-session memory via Memory MCP — 6 entity types

skills.name: cariak-closing
skills.description: Terminal pipeline stage — reconcile verdicts, archive, closeout
